Web-native framework index

Documentation Hub

Read the lifecycle online, open the interactive tools, and keep the primary PDF and source artifacts beside the working record. The web pages are designed to be accessible and indexable; the PDF remains the stable download record.

Start with an assessment Download framework PDF

Documentation map

Read the PALO lifecycle

PALO connects governance decisions across the lifecycle. Each phase should leave a proportionate record that can be reviewed, updated, and handed to the next responsible person.

01 Ideation

Define the purpose

Describe the problem, intended benefit, affected people, decision authority, and the reasons AI is being considered.

02 Assessment

Classify the case

Use context, purpose, actor, impact, and delegated authority to route the system to the right level of review.

03 Design

Choose controls

Turn rights, safety, security, data, transparency, and human-agency risks into design constraints and review gates.

04 Development

Build with evidence

Record functional intent, development environment, tests, changes, approvals, and the assumptions made by the team.

05 Deployment

Release with gates

Set owners, monitoring, KPIs/KRIs, user information, incident routes, and a clear decision to deploy or pause.

06 Review and retirement

Close the loop

Review performance and incidents, preserve the final evidence, manage change, and retire the system responsibly.

No documentation card matches that search.

Open the working tools

Interactive modules

Use the web modules for a working session, then keep the result with the responsible team and the relevant primary documents.

Classify

Risk Tiering Calculator

Initial risk classification and EU AI Act routing questions.

Open Risk Tiering

Assess impacts

FRIA Assessment

Article 27 readiness and contextual fundamental-rights questions.

Open FRIA

Design

AI Model Canvas

Plan the use case, stakeholders, risks, controls, and lifecycle ownership.

Open Model Canvas

Monitor

KPI and KRI Generator

Choose governance indicators for accountability, risk, and operational follow-up.

Open KPI Generator

Compare

Framework Comparison

Place the PALO workflow beside major governance references and standards.

Open Comparison

Audit

AuditBench Explorer

Explore hidden model behaviors and the governance questions they create.

Open AuditBench

Protect data

Poisoning Boomerang

Data integrity, provenance, robustness, detection, and remediation.

Open the study

Develop

AI Dev Governance

Controls for AI-assisted software development and rapid prototyping.

Open AI Dev Governance

Delegate

PALO-AM

Agent identity, authority, action space, autonomy, controls, and evidence.

Open PALO-AM

Connect

Assessment Path

Route the case through the toolkit and export a local evidence bundle.

Open Assessment Path

Primary documents and sources

Keep the source record close

The framework PDF and supporting files are the primary record. The HTML pages provide a readable, searchable entry point for people and search engines.

Framework

PALO Framework v2

Primary framework document for the lifecycle method, governance objects, and operating model.

Download PALOFrameworkV2.pdf

Research record

PALO v1 paper

Earlier paper describing Principled AI Lifecycle Orchestration in Business.

Download the v1 paper

Extension

PALO-AM standalone document

Detailed agentic governance modality with action-space, autonomy, controls, and evidence.

Download the DOCX

Worksheet

FRIA worksheet

Spreadsheet support for the FRIA assessment and evidence collection.

Download the worksheet

Template

PALO Canvas JSON

Machine-readable canvas template for teams building a structured use-case record.

Open the JSON template

External references

Governance source set

Start with official or primary sources for the EU AI Act, standards, risk management, and human-rights context.

  • EU AI Act on EUR-Lex
  • NIST AI RMF
  • OECD AI Principles
  • UNESCO Recommendation

Contribute and verify

The repository is the open source of the toolkit. Review the contribution, conduct, security, privacy, and accessibility notes before adding or relying on a module.

Open GitHub Contributing Changelog Security Accessibility

Copyright 2026 PALO Framework. Web documentation and primary downloads are maintained together.
